'''Jerri''' was a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] and member of the [[Des'maric Pirates]]. Jerri earned [[Miktiss]]'s trust quickly, and became one of his [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenants]], gaining command of one of the group's [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat|Skipray Blastboats]].
